issuer_id.description: ID of the user who issued the JWT.

audience_id.description: ID of the user targeted by the JWT.

created_at.description: Creation date of the JWT. (RFC 3339 format)

updated_at.description: Last update date of the JWT. (RFC 3339 format)

expires_at.description: Expiration date of the JWT. (RFC 3339 format)

ip.description: IP address used during the creation of the JWT. (IP address)

user_agent.description: User-agent used during the creation of the JWT.
